description: Xenomoon Forge hooks — block destructive git/shell ops before they run, grant sub-agent project/library edits so backgrounded workers aren't auto-denied, re-inject the caveman terse-output rule on every sub-agent tool call so it survives long turns, log sub-agent rtk-prefix usage (observe-only), and (opt-in) refresh the project's graphify knowledge graph after edits (PostToolUse — AST-only graphify update; OFF by default, enabled per-project via graphify-out/.autoupdate or XENOMOON_GRAPHIFY_AUTOUPDATE). (rtk enforcement itself is the user's own global hook, not shipped here — this only measures whether sub-agents follow the instruction.)
